title: Processed Age Control Event
description: This schema describes the structure of the processed age control events published by the MCPE service after an age control response has been processed.

receiptId.description: The receipt identifier associated with the age control request

processedReceiptId.description: The transaction identifier of the processed receipt

status.description: The status of the age control processing

message.description: Comma-separated list of item IDs that were removed during age control processing
